explanation: The diagram shows a well-structured microservices architecture with distinct services (customers-service, genai-service, vets-service, pets-service) each handling specific domains and having their own databases. The UI + API Gateway acts as a routing layer without accumulating business logic or responsibilities. There are no signs of a single service taking on too many responsibilities or dependencies that would indicate a monolithic behavior. Each service appears to adhere to the single responsibility principle, and there are clear boundaries between them.
